must_do.full_text:
AMD CEO Lisa Su just killed Nvidia’s $4,000 AI box with a $1,499 lunchbox.

She walked on stage, held it in one hand, and ran a 235 billion parameter model live. No data center. No cloud. No rented GPU.

The chip inside is something nobody saw coming. AMD’s Ryzen AI Max+ 395 is https://t.co/caIIqQCCRp
must_do.summary: AMD CEO Lisa Su发布Ryzen AI Max+ 395芯片，$1,499价格运行2350亿参数模型，对标Nvidia $4,000方案。单产品硬件叙事，有明确价格对比和性能数据。

有明确价格
反常识/意外性
angles: AMD终于用$1499芯片干掉Nvidia $4000方案
Lisa Su一手拿起的AI芯片革命：本地运行2350亿参数模型
反转：最强AI芯片竟然比你想的便宜3倍

must_do.full_text:
Amazon invested $8 billion in Anthropic.

Anthropic’s biggest investor.

Amazon researchers jailbroke Fable 5.

Then Andy Jassy personally called the White House Thursday night.

By Friday at 5:20pm Anthropic got a letter.

Models shut down by Friday evening.

At least five other https://t.co/5CfM3jgbdJ
must_do.summary: 亚马逊8亿美元投资Anthropic后，其研究员破解Fable 5，CEO Andy Jassy周四夜间致电白宫，周五下午Anthropic收到信函，模型随即关闭。涉及多家公司，暗示政策干预。
viral_signals: 终于/第一型选题：首次曝光的政策干预事件

must_do.full_text:
Two days ago the US banned Claude Fable 5.

Yesterday China dropped GLM 5.2.

Today GLM 5.2 is #1 on @bridgebench BS at 100.0,  and #1 on Reasoning at 42.8, beating Fable 5.

At 1/10th the cost and 300 tokens per second.

You cannot export control your way out of an open source https://t.co/n7Ag9vYV9z

must_do.full_text:
Anthropic is in its own league.

Just days after the launch of Anthropic's Claude Fable 5, the company suspended access to the model after US authorities raised "security concerns."

Anthropic said it was ordered to "suspend foreign nationals" from using Claude Fable 5, and
must_do.summary: Anthropic因美国当局安全顾虑，暂停Claude Fable 5对外国用户的访问。这是Claude新版本发布后的罕见政策转变，反映AI产品面临的监管压力。
viral_signals: 终于/第一型选题：新产品发布即遭暂停

从自由到管制：AI大模型的监管困局

must_do.full_text: BREAKING: Anthropic says its newest AI model is too powerful to release to the public

priority.full_text:
めっちゃ長文かつ丁寧なに
  
「日本の製造業は勘違いしてんじゃねーよ」
 「お前らはAIを全然理解してねぇ」
 「GAFAMが持ってないデータなんて幻想だろ」
 「フィジカルAIで製造業復活なんて単純な話じゃねぇ」  

という内容でした。
実際そうなので、勘違いを正すのは大事だと思いました。
priority.summary: 日本制造业对AI的认知存在误区：过度迷信物理AI复兴、忽视数据壁垒、低估GAFAM优势。业内人士直言纠正这些幻想很重要。
viral_signals: 反常识/意外性：颠覆常见的「物理AI救制造业」叙事
angles: 「物理AI救不了日本制造业」业内人士直言
